tool_args.label: MNR Hires and Separations Jan-Dec 2024
tool_args.raw_text:
500 new hires and 366 separations resulted in the following:
A net increase of 17 self-identified female and 117 self-identified male employees.
A net increase of 152 minorities
A net decrease of 20 self identified veteran, and
A net decrease of 7 self identified individuals with a disability

tool_args.label: Black History Month Celebration
tool_args.raw_text: Black History Month Celebration February 20, 2025 – Black Employee Group for Inclusion and Networking (B.E.G.I.N) hosted their Annual Black History Program. The theme African Americans and Labor focuses on the various and profound ways that work and working of all kinds – free and unfree, skilled, and unskilled, vocational, and voluntary – intersect with the collective experiences of Black people.
